title: Dwatkiss
compiled_truth: Dwatkiss is an external contact at [Bracewell & Patterson](companies/bracewell). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-09-21), Dwatkiss sent 23 and received 296 emails, totalling 319 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (8), [Richard B Sanders](people/richard-b-sanders) (6), [Snovose](people/snovose) (5), [Skean](people/skean) (5), [Jhartso](people/jhartso) (5).
